---
ID: SLD-FE-340
Title: Canvas Snapping Guides and Precision Layout
Status: Backlog
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-25
---

As a slide editor user
I want snapping, alignment guides, and spacing hints while moving/resizing layers
So I can create precise layouts without manual pixel nudging loops

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Drag and resize interactions support configurable snap-to-grid and snap-to-object behavior.
- [ ] Visual guides appear for edge, center, and equal-spacing alignments during manipulation.
- [ ] Snapping can be temporarily bypassed via modifier key for fine-grain placement.
- [ ] Multi-select alignment/distribution tools integrate with snapping guide system.
- [ ] Keyboard accessibility and existing guardrails (locked layers, bounds) remain intact.
